name: Virtusa Corporation
overview_text: Virtusa is a global information technology consulting and outsourcing company that specializes in providing business and technology consulting services to leading companies worldwide.
nature_of_company: Publicly Traded Company Listed on New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: VRTU)
headquarters_address: 405 Little Falls Drive, Wilmington, DE 19808, USA
operating_countries: Over 28 countries across Asia, Europe, North America, and Australia

offerings_description: Virtusa provides a range of services including Application Development, Cloud Services, Digital Consulting, Cybersecurity, and more.
core_value_proposition: Virtusa helps clients accelerate digital transformation and achieve sustainable growth.
unique_differentiators: [{'unique_distinguisher': 'End-to-end digital transformation solutions'}, {'unique_distinguisher': 'Experienced professionals with deep domain expertise'}]

go_to_market_strategy: Virtusa focuses on building strategic partnerships with clients and investing in R&D to stay ahead in the market.
future_projections: Virtusa aims to achieve $10B in revenue by 2025 and expand its presence in emerging markets.
work_culture_summary: Virtusa has a strong focus on employee empowerment, innovation, and customer satisfaction.
layoff_history: No major layoffs in the last 5 years
leave_policy: Generous leave policy including vacation and sick leave
location_centrality: Good public transportation and parking options available
legal_issues: No major legal issues in the last 5 years
geopolitical_risks: Moderate risk due to global business operations
macro_risks: High level of competition and market volatility

description: Virtusa is a global information technology consulting and outsourcing company that specializes in providing business and technology consulting services to leading companies worldwide.
vision_statement: To be the most trusted partner for digital transformation and innovation.
mission_statement: Empowering businesses to thrive in a rapidly changing world through innovative technology solutions.

core_values.innovation: Fostering a culture of innovation and experimentation.
core_values.collaboration: Building strong relationships with clients, partners, and employees.
core_values.integrity: Maintaining the highest standards of ethics and integrity.

sales_motion: Virtusa's sales motion is centered around its proprietary 'Digital Acceleration Platform' (DAP), which enables clients to accelerate their digital transformation journeys.
exit_strategy_history: Virtusa has a history of successful exits, including its IPO in 2006 and the sale of its healthcare business to Cognizant in 2018.
carbon_footprint: Virtusa has set a goal to reduce its carbon footprint by 50% by 2025.
ethical_sourcing: Virtusa has implemented a robust ethical sourcing program, which includes a code of conduct and a supplier engagement framework.
benchmark_vs_peers: Virtusa's revenue growth rate has outpaced its peers in the IT services industry over the past three years.
industry_associations: Virtusa is a member of several industry associations, including the National Association of Software and Services Companies (NASSCOM) and the International Association of Outsourcing Professionals (IAOP).

case_studies.title: Digital Transformation for a Leading Retailer
case_studies.description: Virtusa helped a leading retailer to transform its digital landscape, resulting in a 25% increase in online sales.

case_studies.title: Cloud Migration for a Financial Services Firm
case_studies.description: Virtusa migrated a financial services firm to the cloud, resulting in a 30% reduction in IT costs.

sustainability_csr: Virtusa has a strong commitment to sustainability and corporate social responsibility, with a focus on reducing its environmental impact and promoting social responsibility.
crisis_behavior: Virtusa has a well-established crisis management framework, which includes a crisis management team and a communication plan.
